scroller_feed: CRITICAL: NEW YORK, USA TARGETED FOR SUPPLY CHAIN BREAK | GLOBAL MARKETS EXPERIENCE FLUCTUATIONS AS ECONOMIC INSTABILITY RISES. TRADE TENSIONS ESCALATE BETWEEN MAJOR ECONOMIES, THREATENING SUPPLY CHAINS. CITIES WITH STRONG PROTOCOLS AND LOW BOTTLENECKS REMAIN STABLE, WHILE THOSE WITH HIGH DEVIATIONS FROM STABILITY FACE COLLAPSE.
